description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a boxy, angular body and a matte camouflage paint scheme in shades of black, gray, and white. The vehicle features reinforced windows, thick doors, and a robust front grille with a protective metal bumper. On the roof, there is a mounted machine gun with a protective shield, as well as additional equipment such as antennas and spotlights. The sides display rugged, off-road tires with deep treads, and the vehicle's body is covered in visible armor plating, including sloped panels and reinforced sections. The rear of the vehicle has louvered vents and additional armor, while the overall design emphasizes protection, mobility, and tactical functionality.
description: A heavily armored, camouflaged combat tactical vehicle with reinforced windows, a roof-mounted machine gun, and rugged off-road tires.
description_view_0: Front view showing the armored grille, protective bumper, and reinforced windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the roof-mounted machine gun, side armor, and rugged tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying louvered vents, rear armor plating, and exhaust outlets.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible side armor, windows, and the mounted weapon on the roof.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible roof-mounted machine gun with protective shield, centrally located.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with reinforced doors, sloped panels, and thick, angular sections; visible on all sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Matte camouflage pattern in black, gray, and white with irregular, organic shapes.
attribute_military_markings: Raised text 'MADE WITH PRECISION' on the side; no other visible insignia or numbers.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; appear reinforced for rugged terrain.
